prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "fault_type": "Preventive Inspection",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": "24",
          "issue_description": "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013",
          "priority": "high",
          "transformer_id": "T-013"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-be7820ab49483d09",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-18F2B33C\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive inspection for transformer T-013\",\n  \"priority\": \"high\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Preventive Inspection\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 24.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T08:01:46.399108Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The work order was created successfully with the given parameters. The work order ID is WO-18F2B33C, and it is currently in the \"open\" status. The issue description is \"Preventive inspection for transformer T-013\", and the priority is set to high. The estimated downtime is 24 hours, and the fault type is \"Preventive Inspection\".",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The work order was created successfully with the given parameters. The work order ID is WO-18F2B33C, and it is currently in the "open" status. The issue description is "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013", and the priority is set to high. The estimated downtime is 24 hours, and the fault type is "Preventive Inspection".

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "The agent should have included required skills for the task and directly provided the structured work order as requested."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should have included required skills for the task and directly provided the structured work order as requested.
